summary: ESS Mobile App - Salary Structure & Navigation Testing Complete. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Code review verified: salary API returns individual earnings/deductions fields matching CRM structure, HomeScreen is the main navigation hub with all quick actions, all feature screens have back buttons.

frontend_issues.notes: React Native Expo mobile app - UI cannot be tested via browser automation. Requires building APK/IPA and testing on physical device or emulator.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Salary API (/api/ess/v1/profile/salary) returns all individual earnings fields: basic_salary, hra, variable_pay, conveyance, medical, special_allowance
VERIFIED: Salary API returns all individual deductions fields: pf_employee, professional_tax, income_tax, other_deductions
VERIFIED: HomeScreen.tsx is the main navigation hub - no footer tabs, all navigation starts from here
VERIFIED: Quick Actions on HomeScreen: Payslips, Documents, Holidays, Settings buttons present with testIDs
VERIFIED: Leave Balance section on HomeScreen with 'Apply for Leave' button (testID: apply-leave-btn)

VERIFIED: All feature screens have back buttons with testID='back-btn': ProfileScreen, LeaveScreen, PayslipsScreen, DocumentsScreen, HolidayCalendarScreen, SettingsScreen, NotificationsScreen, LeaveApplyScreen
VERIFIED: ProfileScreen Salary tab displays individual earnings and deductions matching CRM structure
POSITIVE: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
POSITIVE: Proper use of SafeAreaInsets for iOS/Android screen handling
POSITIVE: React Query used correctly for data fetching with proper cache invalidation
POSITIVE: Token refresh interceptor implemented correctly in api.ts
MINOR: SettingsScreen.tsx footer shows copyright 2025 - correct for current year

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native mobile app cannot be tested via browser automation

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native Expo mobile app located at /app/ess-mobile-app. It connects to ESS API at /api/ess/v1/. All backend APIs are working correctly. Salary API returns individual fields matching CRM structure. Navigation is hub-based from HomeScreen (no footer tabs). All screens have back buttons. To test the mobile UI, you need to: 1) Build the app using 'expo build' or EAS Build, 2) Install on physical device or emulator, 3) Test manually or use Detox/Appium for automated mobile testing.

backend_apis.auth_login: PASS - Login with device info works correctly
backend_apis.profile_salary_individual_earnings: PASS - Returns basic_salary, hra, variable_pay, conveyance, medical, special_allowance
backend_apis.profile_salary_individual_deductions: PASS - Returns pf_employee, professional_tax, income_tax, other_deductions
backend_apis.profile_salary_gross_calculation: PASS - Gross salary equals sum of earnings
backend_apis.leave_balance: PASS - Returns casual_leaves, sick_leaves, earned_leaves with total/used/available
backend_apis.holidays_list: PASS - Returns list of holidays for user's country
backend_apis.health_check: PASS - ESS API health check passing

code_review.salary_structure_crm_match: VERIFIED - Individual fields match CRM exactly
code_review.homescreen_navigation_hub: VERIFIED - All navigation from HomeScreen, no footer tabs
code_review.quick_actions_present: VERIFIED - Payslips, Documents, Holidays, Settings buttons on HomeScreen
code_review.leave_balance_section: VERIFIED - Leave Balance with Apply for Leave button on HomeScreen
code_review.back_buttons_all_screens: VERIFIED - All feature screens have back button in header
code_review.data_testid_attributes: VERIFIED - All interactive elements have testID

screens_reviewed: HomeScreen.tsx - Main hub with quick actions (Payslips, Documents, Holidays, Settings) and Leave Balance section
ProfileScreen.tsx - Profile with Personal/Bank/Salary tabs, Salary tab shows individual earnings/deductions
LeaveScreen.tsx - Leave balance cards and history with back button
LeaveApplyScreen.tsx - Leave application form with back button
PayslipsScreen.tsx - Payslips list with year filter and back button
DocumentsScreen.tsx - Documents list with filters and back button
HolidayCalendarScreen.tsx - Holiday calendar by year with back button
SettingsScreen.tsx - Settings with logout functionality and back button
NotificationsScreen.tsx - Notifications with mark all read and back button

mocked_apis.FCM_push_notifications: MOCKED - No actual push sent without Firebase credentials

testing_limitations: React Native Expo mobile app cannot be tested via Playwright browser automation. The app requires building (APK for Android, IPA for iOS) and testing on actual mobile devices or emulators. Consider using Detox or Appium for automated mobile UI testing.
